# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/).

<!-- Generated by git-cliff. Run `make changelog` to regenerate. -->

## [Unreleased]

### Features

- **backend**: Financial insight extraction API with provider-agnostic LLM support (Anthropic default; OpenAI and Ollama supported)
- **backend**: Pydantic strict validation with accounting-identity layer
- **backend**: OpenAPI schema export + drift gate
- **frontend**: React + TypeScript SPA with Vite build pipeline
- **ci**: Full monorepo CI — lint, type-check, test, security, docker
- **ci**: Secret scanning via gitleaks
- **ci**: Spell checking via codespell + cspell
- **config**: Commitlint + conventional commits enforcement
- **config**: git-cliff changelog automation
- **deps**: Dependabot for pip, npm, and GitHub Actions
